selection.vendorProgramSoql: SELECT Id, Vendor__c FROM Vendor_Customization__c WHERE Active__c = true AND Vendor__c != null ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC LIMIT 1
selection.requirementSoql: SELECT Id, Requirement_Type__c FROM Vendor_Program_Requirement__c WHERE Vendor_Program__c = '{{vendorProgramId}}' AND Active__c = true ORDER BY Sequence__c ASC LIMIT 1

assertions.name: Onboarding links to selected vendor program
assertions.soql: SELECT Vendor_Customization__c FROM Onboarding__c WHERE Id = '{{onboardingId}}' LIMIT 1

assertions.name: Onboarding links to created opportunity
assertions.soql: SELECT Opportunity__c FROM Onboarding__c WHERE Id = '{{onboardingId}}' LIMIT 1

assertions.name: At least one onboarding requirement exists
assertions.soql: SELECT Id FROM Onboarding_Requirement__c WHERE Onboarding__c = '{{onboardingId}}'

assertions.name: Selected requirement propagated
assertions.soql: SELECT Id FROM Onboarding_Requirement__c WHERE Onboarding__c = '{{onboardingId}}' AND Vendor_Program_Requirement__c = '{{requirementId}}'
